gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/110)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/110)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ صَلَاةُ الْأَوَّابِينَ الْخَمْسُونَ كُلُّهَا بِقُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ .

en.hubeali: Abu Dawood, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, by his chain, from Safwan Al Jammal who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘The Salāts of the repentant are fifty, all of them being with ‘Say Heazwj Allahazwj is One’ (Chapter 112)’.
en.sarwar: 13. Abu Dawud has narrated from Ali ibn Mahziyar from through chain of his narrators from Safwan al-Jammal who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Salah (prayer) of repenting people with all fifty of them there is Chapter 112.’”
